message:
feat(cli,share,server): safe atomic share-update pipeline, expanded robot mode, and search UI improvements

Share update safety overhaul (bundle.rs, ~540 lines):
- Introduce an owned-path registry (SHARE_UPDATE_OWNED_PATHS) declaring
  every file and directory the share pipeline is allowed to create,
  replace, or remove — preventing accidental modification of user-added
  content in the bundle directory
- New atomic update flow: back up existing owned outputs → stage new
  outputs in a temp directory → remove old outputs → copy staged outputs
  into place, with full rollback-on-failure that restores backups if any
  step fails
- All move/copy/remove operations validate against symlinks to prevent
  symlink-following attacks in shared or untrusted bundle directories
- validate_share_signing_options enforces that --signing-public-out
  requires --signing-key (also enforced via clap `requires` attribute)

Share pipeline (finalize, scope, scrub, snapshot, static_render):
- finalize.rs: expanded post-bundle integrity checks
- scope.rs: ~270 lines of new scope filtering and project boundary logic
- scrub.rs: ~320 lines of enhanced PII/secret scrubbing passes
- snapshot.rs: ~200 lines of improved snapshot capture and diffing
- static_render.rs: ~390 lines of enhanced static HTML generation with
  improved thread/message rendering

CLI (lib.rs, robot.rs):
- ~580 lines of new CLI functionality including expanded subcommands,
  improved doctor salvage error matching, and share archive validation
- Robot mode (~210 lines): expanded structured output for automation
  consumers

Server UI (mail_ui.rs, templates):
- Search results page enhanced with additional filter controls and
  improved result rendering
- Project page gains new metadata display section
- Template tests expanded to cover new rendering paths

Resources:
- MCP resource endpoints expanded with additional query capabilities

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
